calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberly Kerry for Martin Weiner (Executor).

Ms. Kerry stated that the certificates of deposit were put on attachment two of the Inventory and Appraisal inadvertently, that she did not know if they were purchased at a discount and that she did not submit a request for extraordinary fees relating to hours. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Continued To Feb-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Continued To Feb-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberly Kerry for Martin Weiner (Petitioner).

This matter was in heard in the presence of Court Personnel only. No other Parties were present in the courtroom. The Court reviewed the documents presented by Ms. Kerry, which were described on the record. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Guitron.

Ex Parte Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
